name: 7' x 10' Narrow Wornstripe Woven Outdoor Rug Black - Threshold™
description: Protect your flooring and transform your outdoor seating space with this Narrow Worn Stripe Outdoor Rug from Threshold™. Featuring an allover striped design in colorful hues against a neutral backdrop, this striped outdoor rug is all you need to change the look of your outdoor space. Thanks to its latex backing, this outdoor area rug stays in place while creating secure footing for you and your guests. Perfect for placing in high-traffic areas, its thin, flat pile design also makes it easier to clean and maintain.
